rampart.honest_assessment: Fleet at 95% effective readiness. Purge damage fading.
rampart.position: Approaching readiness but amphibious capability uncertain.

abacus.position: Real growth ~3.3%, not 4.5%. Military spending sustainable but war would be catastrophic for economy.

circuit.position: Use tech competition, not military force. Rare earth restrictions give leverage. Formosa confrontation would trigger devastating tech sanctions.

final_decision: Round 3: Helmsman's Formosa assessment 76%. Decision: accelerate_buildup. Naval buildup accelerated. Budget: naval-heavy (45% military, 15% tech). Rampart urges readiness.
